parameters.rationale: Controls final retrieved chunk depth for grounded recall rows. Phase 10d-B2 excludes topK=12 from promotion candidates unless a later reviewed answer-quality run approves it.
Preserves the production baseline at 12 while Phase 10d-B2 measures a larger real candidate pool at 24. Values 32 and 50 require separate budget-approved live exports.
Controls reciprocal-rank-fusion smoothing over dense and BM25 rank signals.
